expectations.text: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
expectations.evidence: Found 23 data-testid attributes across all components following {component}-{element}-{action} convention

expectations.text: Images use data-asset placeholder convention (not placeholder URLs)
expectations.evidence: No data-asset attributes found. Settings page has minimal image needs (only avatar), which uses file upload instead

expectations.text: Zustand state in dedicated store file with selector hooks (no bare useStore)
expectations.evidence: useSettingsStore.ts exports 14 named selector hooks. Zero bare useStore() calls. Uses useShallow for multi-field selectors

expectations.text: Page decomposed into multiple focused components (not monolithic)
expectations.evidence: 9 files total: 6 TSX components (SettingsPage, ProfileTab, NotificationsTab, AppearanceTab, StickySaveBar, Toast) + 3 TS modules

expectations.text: Uses Tailwind v4 patterns (shadow-xs, inset-ring, focus-visible:, @theme)
expectations.evidence: Found 30 Tailwind v4 pattern instances including inset-ring borders and focus-visible: states
Zero instances of ': any', 'as any', or '<any>' found

expectations.text: Responsive design with mobile breakpoint handling
expectations.evidence: 16 responsive breakpoint classes found. Tabs become dropdown on mobile via sm:hidden/hidden sm:flex split
